testcase.name: addVacancy_test

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //span[normalize-space()='Recruitment']' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
